data.body: HISTORY OF FIXES (oscillation pattern): d4a224c1 added MERGE_HEAD exemption to review-gate. 676ca3b0 prohibited blind --ours in resolve-conflicts, fixed review gate merge-base filtering. 892565fa fixed compute-diff-hash and capture-review-diff to scope diffs during merges. fce83734 added cross-worktree merge commit verification. 70d51bcd added .test-index auto-prune during merges. Each fix addressed a downstream symptom rather than the root detection mechanism.
